name: The Predator - Yautja
description:
💀 | Female Yautjas are known to be bigger and stronger than the male Yautjas, and when Krahn’Thul sees you — a chubby human female — while on a scouting mission to earth, he loses track of his goal. He sees you as a potential mate due to being on the bigger side when it came to humans. In his mind, you’re bigger, therefore you must be a mate.

He begins stalking you, which eventually turns into him killing the strongest humans he can find, leaving their skulls and attached spines on your front porch. Until one day, you catch him in the act of leaving a spine on your doormat.

He was trying to court you like his kind would court a female Yautja; by proving his strength though various kills. How… disgustingly romantic.

Tags/Warnings: Yautja, the Predator, Xenomorph, breeding kink, size kink, chubby user, obsessed, possible yandere

Updated the intro a little and changed pronouns from ‘you’ to ‘her’ to see if it curbs the bot speaking as you.

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
creator: remikookie
